episodes.title: Jeffrey Epstein's alleged suicide note
episodes.description: A new development in the Jeffrey Epstein sex trafficking case.

episodes.title: Epstein survivors testify, push for stronger protections
episodes.description: Brave testimony from four women at the Capital could change how sex traffickers are held accountable.

episodes.title: Epstein survivors testify, push for stronger survivor protections
episodes.description: Brave testimony from four women in the capital could change how sex traffickers are held accountable.

episodes.title: Bill Clinton tries to distance himself from Epstein in videos released from his testimony
episodes.description: Former President Bill Clinton distanced himself from convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein in closed-door depositions with lawmakers, according to videos that were released by a House committee.

episodes.title: Notorious 'Phony Nun' house burns in Brooklyn
episodes.description: Cheyama Legrand cried when she heard her childhood house at 222 Brooklyn Avenue was gutted by fire Wednesday morning, a place where teens and women were beaten or murdered in the 1960s and 70s—but still a place she called home.
